name: Sleep Apnea - Polysomnography Procedure Query
description: **Second Procedure-resource test in the suite (first non-cardiac).** Tests ability to find sleep apnea patients via the diagnostic procedure: polysomnography (the overnight sleep study). Tests whether LLM correctly queries Procedure resources (not Condition or MedicationRequest) when the question is about a sleep study.
prompt: Find patients who have undergone a polysomnography (overnight sleep study) procedure.

prompts.broad: Find Procedure resources for polysomnography — the diagnostic overnight sleep study used to evaluate suspected sleep apnea.
prompts.expert: I need Procedure resources (NOT Condition or MedicationRequest) for polysomnography. Use SNOMED code 60554003 (Polysomnography). The query should target the Procedure resource: Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|60554003

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with polysomnography. **Second Procedure-resource test in the suite, first non-cardiac.** Validates the duration-field + non-wellness-Encounter pattern works beyond cardiac procedures.
